content: Added cloud save synchronization between devices
Improved game launch speed by optimizing cache loading
Fixed random crashes while downloading updates
Added custom themes for the launcher UI
Integrated FPS overlay support for supported games
Reduced RAM usage while running in background
Added automatic game detection from installed launchers
Fixed shortcut creation issues on Windows 11
Added a cheater programm, that can be activated by clicking on the thunder icon, at the game that you want
the launcher now updates much more smoothly
Add custom game from a specific exe path
the launcher now updates more smoothly
